title: THSTI Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Research Officer, Project Manager and More Posts
organization: Translational Health Science and Technology Institute (THSTI)
short_info: The Translational Health Science and Technology Institute (THSTI) has officially announced the Project Positions Recruitment 2026 with 6 openings. The detailed notification was published on 12 May 2026 at the official website. Candidates who meet the age criteria as per Government of India norms (SC/ST 5 yr, OBC 3 yr, PwBD 10–15 yr, etc.) and hold a Post Graduate degree in Life Sciences/Pharmacy/Public Health (Ph.D. desirable), with clinical trial monitoring experience, GCP certification, and Finance & Accounts experience (depending on post) can now submit their online applications from 12 May

age_limit.age_details: As per GoI norms (SC/ST 5 yr, OBC 3 yr, PwBD 10–15 yr, etc.)
age_limit.details: All Posts: As per GoI norms (SC/ST 5 yr, OBC 3 yr, PwBD 10–15 yr, etc.).

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate in Life Sciences/Pharmacy/Public Health, PhD (desirable), Clinical trial monitoring experience, GCP certification, Finance & Accounts experience
qualification.details: Research Officer: PG in Life Sciences + 3 years of clinical trial monitoring experience OR PhD + monitoring experience. Project Manager (Monitoring): PG + 5 years of monitoring experience OR PhD + 2 years of monitoring experience (desirable: project/line management experience). Clinical Research Associate: Master’s in Life Sciences/Pharmacy/Public Health + 3 years of monitoring experience OR MBBS/BDS/BHMS/BAMS/BPT + monitoring experience. Senior Project Associate: PG in Life Sciences + mandatory GCP certification. Consultant (Finance): B.Com + 4 years OR M.Com + 2 years of experience in Finance & Accounts.

salary_details.details: Research Officer: ₹67,000 + HRA Per Month Project Manager (Monitoring): ₹78,000 + HRA Per Month Clinical Research Associate: ₹67,000 + HRA Per Month Senior Project Associate: ₹56,000 + HRA Per Month Consultant (Finance): ₹60,000 (fixed) Per Month

selection_process: Application Screening/Shortlisting Written Test/Skill Test Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the THSTI Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 01-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of THSTI to complete the application.
